ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hpi" (
  "hpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HPI metadata entry */,
  "hpi_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPI type */,
  "hpi_flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPI flavor */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level */,
  "place_name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the place name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the HPI metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the HPI metadata was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the HPI (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_target" TEXT /* Target of the data */,
  "processing_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the data processing task */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message encountered during the data processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_place_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_name_id") REFERENCES place_names ("place_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_hpi_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("hpi_flavor_id") REFERENCES hpi_flavors ("hpi_flavor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_hpi_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("hpi_type_id") REFERENCES hpi_types ("hpi_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hpi_types" (
  "hpi_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HPI type */,
  "hpi_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the HPI type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HPI type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the HPI type is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the HPI type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the HPI type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hpi_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hpi_flavors" (
  "hpi_flavor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HPI flavor */,
  "hpi_flavor_name" TEXT /* Name of the HPI flavor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HPI flavor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the HPI flavor is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the HPI flavor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the HPI flavor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hpi_flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the frequency is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frequency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frequency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the level is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "place_names" (
  "place_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each place name */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Traditional name of HPI */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the place name */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the place name is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the place name was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the place name was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data engineer, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active or disabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "hpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPI being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the HPI */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the HPI was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "is_success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message encountered during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("hpi_id") REFERENCES hpi ("hpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hpi_data" (
  "hpi_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HPI data entry */,
  "hpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPI being stored */,
  "data" TEXT /* HPI data */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the HPI data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the HPI data was last updated */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  "data_compression" TEXT /* Type of data compression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hpi_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_data_hpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("hpi_id") REFERENCES hpi ("hpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data type is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hpi_metadata" (
  "hpi_metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HPI metadata entry */,
  "hpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPI being stored */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* HPI metadata */,
  "metadata_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metadata type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the HPI metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the HPI metadata was last updated */,
  "metadata_size" INTEGER /* Size of the metadata */,
  "metadata_format" TEXT /* Format of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hpi_metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_metadata_metadata_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metadata_type_id") REFERENCES metadata_types ("metadata_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_metadata_hpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("hpi_id") REFERENCES hpi ("hpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_types" (
  "metadata_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata type */,
  "metadata_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metadata type is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hpi_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "hpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPI being related */,
  "related_hpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related HPI */,
  "relationship_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "relationship_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the relationship (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_relationships_related_hpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_hpi_id") REFERENCES hpi ("hpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_relationships_relationship_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_type_id") REFERENCES relationship_types ("relationship_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hpi_relationships_hpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("hpi_id") REFERENCES hpi ("hpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationship_types" (
  "relationship_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship type */,
  "relationship_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the relationship type is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_type_id")
)
